name: USS Lowry (DD 770)
events: 26 Oct 1944 USS Lowry departed from San Pedro, California bound for Pearl Harbor.
14 Dec 1944 USS Lowry arrived at San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
10 Feb 1945 USS Lowry departed from Ulithi with TF 58.
1 Mar 1945 USS Lowry returns to Ulithi.
21 Mar 1945 USS Lowry departed from Ulithi to assist in the Okinawa landings.
27 Jul 1945 USS Lowry arrived at San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
